author: y4rr
content: Decision: Adding new() constructors to GptqQ4, AwqQ4, HqqWeights in quant_loaders.rs. The sprint says 'no bug fixing in quant_loaders.rs — test-only dispatch' but constructors are a testability addition (not a dequantization logic change) required because #[non_exhaustive] prevents external struct literal construction from integration tests. The alternative (using pub fields via unsafe transmute or removing #[non_exhaustive]) would be worse. Adding constructors is the idiomatic Rust approach for #[non_exhaustive] structs.
